item.title: #PALLASCAT adorable fact about the Pallas cat, also known as the manul, is its unique facial expression. Pallas cats have a flat, round face with high-set eyes, giving them a perpetual "grumpy" or "angry" look. Despite their seemingly grumpy appearance, t

item.title: Louie was such a good boy on his flight from Chicago to Mexico City 🇲🇽 While cats are normally required to remain inside their carriers underneath the seat we had kind cat loving crew members who let Louie chill in an empty seat next to us ❤️ One of the m
